# katapult_object_storage_bucket (Data Source)

Fetch details for an existing object storage bucket.

Use this data source to look up an existing object storage bucket — for
example, to reference a bucket managed by another Terraform configuration,
or to wire its `public_url` into application config without managing the
bucket itself.

A bucket is identified uniquely by `name`. `object_storage_account_id`
defaults to `uk-lon-1` (the only region currently available) and can be
omitted.

If no matching bucket exists, reading the data source fails with a "not
found" error rather than producing an empty result, so callers can rely on
the attributes being populated.

## Common Patterns

* **Cross-stack references** — a platform stack manages buckets, and an
  application stack reads them via this data source to grant its workload
  access keys.
* **Read-only outputs** — surface `public_url`, `public_read`, and
  `static_site_index` to downstream systems (CDN config, monitoring) without
  declaring the bucket as managed in the current state.

If you also manage the bucket in the same configuration, reference the
resource directly instead of going through this data source — the resource's
attributes are always in sync with the plan.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "katapult_object_storage_bucket" "assets" {
  name                      = "my-org-assets"
  object_storage_account_id = "uk-lon-1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Globally unique bucket name.

### Optional

- `object_storage_account_id` (String) ID of the `katapult_object_storage_account` resource the bucket lives in. The account ID is the region permalink, e.g. `uk-lon-1`. Defaults to `uk-lon-1`.

### Read-Only

- `all_keys_read` (Boolean) Whether all access keys have read permission.
- `all_keys_write` (Boolean) Whether all access keys have write permission.
- `label` (String) Optional bucket label in Katapult.
- `public_list` (Boolean) Whether unauthenticated object listing is allowed.
- `public_read` (Boolean) Whether unauthenticated object reads are allowed.
- `public_url` (String) Public base URL for accessing objects in this bucket.
- `read_key_ids` (Set of String) Access key IDs with read permission on this bucket.
- `serve_static_site` (Boolean) Whether the bucket is served as a static site.
- `static_site_error` (String) Error document suffix for static site serving.
- `static_site_index` (String) Default index document for static site serving.
- `write_key_ids` (Set of String) Access key IDs with write permission on this bucket.

## Related Resources

* [`katapult_object_storage_account`](../resources/object_storage_account.md)
  resource — the account that owns the bucket.
* [`katapult_object_storage_bucket`](../resources/object_storage_bucket.md)
  resource — manage a bucket.
* [`katapult_object_storage_access_key`](../resources/object_storage_access_key.md)
  resource — credentials for accessing the bucket.
